mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memory_images (memory_id, image_url, sort_order) VALUES (#{memoryId}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_images WHERE memory_id = #{memoryId}
SELECT id, memory_id, image_url, sort_order, created_at FROM memory_images WHERE memory_id = #{memoryId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT memory_id, image_url, image_count FROM ( SELECT memory_id, image_url, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY memory_id ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY memory_id) AS image_count FROM memory_images WHERE memory_id IN #{id} ) t WHERE t.rn = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE memory_images SET sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{imageId}
